purpose: Gate a HipKittens route-keyed 64-row SharedKV backward producer slice that uses the production row terms P = exp(QK / sqrt(D) - LSE) and dS = P * (dO V^T - softmax_dot), then emits dQ scratch plus local dK/dV scratch.
timed_boundary: Slice only: B4/S4096/HKV1/D128 route-keyed 64-row row-term score/dQ+dK/dV producer. This is not the full SparseAttnSharedkvGrad boundary and does not yet emit full-D dQ, dOriKV, route-aware dCmpKV, or production dSinks.

build.command: docker run --rm --entrypoint bash --device=/dev/kfd --device=/dev/dri --group-add video --ipc=host --network=host -e HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 -e ROCR_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 -e CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 -v /scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527:/workspace -w /workspace/tools/dsv4_runtime_probe/hipkittens_sharedkv_owner onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori -lc 'export ROCM_PATH=${ROCM_PATH:-/opt/rocm}; make hk_sharedkv_routekeyed_64row_rowterms_dq_dkv GPU_TARGET=CDNA4 ATTN_B=4 ATTN_H_KV=1 ATTN_N=4096'
build.first_compile_failure: The first generic row-term version tried sub_row(P_ij, P_ij, row_vec) on ART tiles. HipKittens generic sub_row accepts RT tiles, so the fix mirrors the dense backward assembly row-term path with scalar registers for LSE and softmax_dot.

previous_routekeyed_score_dq_dkv_slice.row_terms: synthetic/simple row math without production LSE and softmax_dot contract

comparison.read: Adding production LSE/softmax_dot row terms does not introduce a new wall in this 64-row route-keyed producer slice.

decision.reason: The producer slice is finite, no-spill, and row-term overhead is acceptable, but it is still D128 scratch-only. Promotion requires a full source-boundary C4 SharedKV replacement that emits full-D dQ, dOriKV, route-aware dCmpKV, and true dSinks, then beats the current Triton C4 source-boundary gate around 11.02 ms.

next_step: Preserve this route-keyed row-term producer and stage/split full-D DSv4 outputs without carrying every output live in one CTA.
